name: Haunted Elevator - 闹鬼电梯
short_description: Play as a photographer compelled by a haunted elevator to uncover a tragic story. Find dark secrets about your company, using your camera and choices to seek justice or follow a darker path. The outcome is in your hands.
detailed_description:
Play as an intern photographer at a newspaper company. After a long shift, you're ready to go home, but your boss—and the elevator—won't let you. The elevator takes you on a journey, revealing dark secrets about the company that have harmed many. As you uncover these truths, you are faced with the opportunity to deliver justice. Armed with your camera and your decisions.

Features:
  • Multiple Endings
  • Simple but unique puzzles
  • Carefully placed jumpscare(s)
  • Enemy AI

Playtime: 30min - 1Hour

WASD To walk
"C" To use Camera (RMB To activate flash)
If you appear "Short" or "Crouched" Press CTRL to uncrouch
